summary: Harden website search discovery, required input validation, and the validated filter surface from live dogfood findings.
reason: The generated website CLI exposed misleading live search behavior, weak capability discovery, and known-required endpoint inputs only through upstream HTTP failures instead of the local CLI contract.
validated_outcome: The CLI now refuses generic live website search, exposes explicit website-native search helpers, validates ad-id locally, and includes an opt-in live dogfood harness.
